channel.title: CampDeck
channel.description: Reviews of tents, sleeping bags, backpacks, camp stoves, and outdoor gear tested on real trips. We carry what we recommend, sleep in what we review, and cook on what we rate. No glamping gear. No Inst

item.title: Backpacking Gear List: Essential Equipment for a Safe and Comfortable Trip
item.description: The ten essentials updated for modern backpacking: shelter, navigation, water treatment, food, and the gear actually worth carrying.

item.title: Camp Kitchen Guide: Stoves, Cookware, and Water Filtration for Every Budget
item.description: How to set up a camp kitchen by trip type: day hike, weekend backpacking, car camping, and multi-week expedition.

item.title: Tent Buyer's Guide: 3-Season vs 4-Season, Solo vs Group, Weight vs Comfort
item.description: How to choose a backpacking tent: when to go ultralight, when weather resistance matters more, and which brands to trust.

item.title: Osprey Atmos AG 65 Men's Backpacking Pack
item.description: Osprey Atmos AG 65: anti-gravity suspension performance, fit adjustment range, and comparison to the Gregory Baltoro 65.

item.title: Nalgene 32oz Tritan Wide Mouth BPA Free Water Bottle
item.description: Nalgene 32oz Tritan wide mouth vs. Hydro Flask vs. Platypus collapsible: weight, durability, and when each type is the right choice.

item.title: GSI Outdoors Pinnacle Camper Cookset for 4
item.description: GSI Pinnacle 4-person cookset: pot sizes, Teflon durability at 2 years, and how it compares to the Jetboil for group cooking.

item.title: MSR Hubba NX Solo Backpacking Tent
item.description: MSR Hubba NX: packed weight, pole durability, waterproofing in heavy rain, and how it compares to the Big Agnes Copper Spur.

item.title: Black Diamond Spot 350 Headlamp
item.description: Black Diamond Spot 350: lumen output at different modes, burn time, waterproof rating, and comparison to the Petzl Actik Core.

item.title: A practical camp-cookware gift guide (2)
item.description: A practical, buyer-focused guide to comparing camp-cookware options for campdeck.app.
